name: Open WebUI
short_description: User-friendly ChatGPT-style interface for running local LLMs with Ollama.
description: Open WebUI is a ChatGPT-style interface for running local LLMs via Ollama. It offers conversation history, prompt templates, code highlighting, RAG with document upload, admin controls, and integrations for image generation and web search—suitable for private, self-hosted AI assistants.
usecases: Chat with local LLMs (Llama, Mistral, Codellama) completely offline for privacy.
Build a private AI assistant for work or personal use without sending data to OpenAI.
Upload documents and ask questions about them using RAG functionality.
Integrate with image generation models for a complete AI experience.
notes: Requires Ollama to be running with models downloaded
Connects to Ollama on internal Docker network
Supports multiple users with admin controls
